title: Round 1: Warm Pressure
purpose: Recognize the selected state when normal plans are disrupted.

questions.prompt: The plan changes at the last minute. Donte immediately takes over and stops listening. What is the pressure pattern?
questions.hint: Control without listening usually signals overdeveloped D under pressure.

questions.prompt: Everyone is available to help, but Donte acts as if support will fail. Which stage pressure is most visible?
questions.hint: Stage 1 pressure asks whether support feels reliable.

questions.prompt: The healthiest Course 10 move is to adjust without abandoning the goal. Which concept is strongest?
questions.hint: Cognitive flexibility means shifting strategy when conditions change.
